name: Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt.
3. Add the cocoa powder, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, and mace; stir until combined.
4. Gradually add the applesauce and raisins, stirring until just incorporated.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13-inch baking pan.
6. Bake for 45-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it and serving. Optionally, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
